titles_tesim: Book of the Master and the Pupil by St. Thaddeus of Edessa
contents_tesim: Book of the Master and the Pupil by St. Thaddeus of Edessa

Book of the Master and the Pupil written by St. Thaddeus of Edessa while in Mt. Sinai to a brother named Māgī al-Tufail in the form of a debate on religion and in reply to the Jews, consisting of 43 Mimars
